name: Syncly
description: Unified cloud file management platform with AI-powered, search, conversationality with files and multi-platform access.

sections.title: What is Syncly?
paragraphs: Syncly is a unified cloud file management platform that simplifies the way you store, search, and manage files across multiple cloud services like Google Drive and Dropbox. With intelligent file splitting, AI-powered search, and multi-platform access via web and Telegram, Syncly streamlines your workflow.

Powered by FastAPI, React, and the Groq API, Syncly offers secure user management, real-time storage insights, and a conversational AI assistant that extracts relevant information from your files. Whether you're managing storage or searching for specific content, Syncly makes it effortless and secure.

items.name: Multi-Cloud Support
items.description: Manage files across Google Drive and Dropbox.

items.name: AI-Powered Search
items.description: Search files with contextual AI assistance.

items.name: File Splitting
items.description: Intelligently split and upload files to optimal drives.

items.name: Cloud Storage Management
items.description: Unify and manage multiple cloud accounts.

items.name: Smart File Search
items.description: Find files quickly with AI-driven search.

items.name: Secure File Access
items.description: Access files securely via web or Telegram.

sections.title: Technology & Architecture
paragraphs: Syncly is built with a modern tech stack, featuring FastAPI for the backend, Vite + React for the web frontend, and MongoDB for secure data storage. It integrates with Google Drive and Dropbox APIs for cloud storage management and uses the Groq API for AI-powered search and assistance.

The modular architecture ensures scalability, with OAuth 2.0 for secure cloud authentication, JWT for session management, and a Telegram bot for seamless interaction. The AI assistant leverages Llama models to provide context-aware responses, making file search and management smarter and more efficient.

sections.title: Get Started
paragraphs: Syncly is an innovative solution for unified cloud file management. Explore the project on GitHub to see how AI and cloud integration can transform the way you handle files.
